addon.name: [COLOR red]The Red Wizard[/COLOR]
addon.provider-name: Slam, Sarge, Funsterbe, BYB, Zaxxon709, [COLOR red]The Red Wizard[/COLOR]

extension.summary: [COLOR red]The Red Wizard for Kodi 21 Omega and Kodi 22 Piers[/COLOR]
extension.description: [COLOR red]The Red Wizard for installing, updating and maintaining The Red Wizard Kodi 21 Omega and Kodi 22 Piers builds[/COLOR]
extension.disclaimer: [COLOR red]The author of this add-on does not host any content and has no affiliation with the content providers[/COLOR]
extension.news: [COLOR red]2026-05-02 - Reorganisation and rewrite of menus: * (Kodi) Maintenance and (Wizard) Tools separated into separate submenus * Add-on Whitelist moved to the Main menu * Notification moved to the Wizard menu * Enable/Disable Skin Override Protection made visible (Tools submenu, thanks Zaxxon709) - Supports Kodi 21 Omega and Kodi 22 Piers - The Red Wizard has a new home! Go to https://redwizard.xyz[/COLOR]
